sidebar.contactSupport: Contact our support team for assistance.

login.title: Welcome back
login.subtitle: Sign in to your account to continue
login.heroTitle: Give with intention. Track every impact.
login.heroSubtitle: A unified platform for Qurbani, Zakat, Fitrana, disaster relief, and sponsorship — managed end-to-end by Alkhidmat Pakistan.

signup.title: Create your account
signup.subtitle: Takes less than a minute — pick a role and fill in your details.
signup.heroTitle: Join a community of meaningful giving.
signup.heroSubtitle: Create an account to donate, apply for support, or volunteer — every step tracked and verified by Alkhidmat Pakistan.
signup.roleDesc_DONOR: Make donations, pay Zakat, sponsor causes
signup.roleDesc_BENEFICIARY: Apply for loans, rations, and assistance

dashboard.noActivityDesc: Your submissions will show up here once you start interacting with the platform.
dashboard.qurbaniDesc: Seasonal religious actions — active when enabled by admin
dashboard.quickActionsDesc: Jump directly into the most-used flows

greet.donorSub: Your contributions are making a real difference.
greet.beneficiarySub: Submit an application and our team will reach out.
greet.volunteerSub: Every hour you volunteer creates lasting impact.

admin.hereSummary: Here's what's happening across the platform.
admin.quickActionsDesc: Jump into the most common admin tasks
admin.allClearDesc: No items awaiting review. New submissions will show up here.

donation.paymentInstructions: Transfer the amount to our bank account and click below

qurbaniDonation.title: Qurbani Donation
qurbaniDonation.description: Donate a goat or camel for Qurbani — we handle distribution to families in need.
qurbaniDonation.donorInformationDesc: We'll use this to coordinate delivery.
qurbaniDonation.info1: Your donation will be processed within 24–48 hours.
qurbaniDonation.info2: A confirmation call will be made on your registered number.
qurbaniDonation.info3: Payment details are shared after verification.
qurbaniDonation.info4: Delivery dates are subject to availability.
qurbaniDonation.donationRecordedDesc: May Allah accept it. You'll be notified once admin confirms.

rationDonation.title: Ration Donation
rationDonation.description: Donate a ration package to support families through the month.
rationDonation.standardItems: Basic items + tea, milk powder, dates
rationDonation.noneFitCustom: None of these fit? Enter a custom package instead.
rationDonation.amountInNextField: You'll set the amount in the next field.
rationDonation.info1: Ration packages are distributed to vetted families.
rationDonation.info2: You will receive updates about your donation distribution.
rationDonation.info3: Delivery schedule depends on your date and area.
rationDonation.info4: Tax exemption certificate available on request.
rationDonation.donationRecordedDesc: Thank you for your generosity. You'll be notified once admin confirms.

skinCollection.title: Skin Collection
skinCollection.description: Donate your Qurbani animal skin — we collect it free of cost.
skinCollection.noneFitCustom: Don't see your animal? Enter a custom type instead.
skinCollection.specialInstructionsPlaceholder: Special instructions for the pickup team
skinCollection.info1: You're donating the skin itself — there's no payment either way.
skinCollection.info2: Please salt and dry the skin before our team arrives.
skinCollection.info4: Pickup is free — our team will call before arriving.
skinCollection.pickupRequestSubmittedDesc: Our team will contact you to schedule the pickup. Thank you for donating.

orphanSponsorship.title: Orphan Sponsorship
orphanSponsorship.description: Sponsor an orphan child monthly and receive progress updates.
orphanSponsorship.orphanPreferencesDesc: Help us match you with a child.
orphanSponsorship.basicDesc: School fees, books, and basic supplies
orphanSponsorship.premiumDesc: Full support including healthcare and extras
orphanSponsorship.noneFitCustom: None of these fit? Enter a custom tier instead.
orphanSponsorship.customAmountHint: Set the monthly amount manually in the next field.
orphanSponsorship.info1: Monthly progress reports and updates about the child
orphanSponsorship.info3: Opportunity to write letters to the sponsored child
orphanSponsorship.sponsorshipRecordedDesc: Thank you for changing a life. We'll reach out shortly with next steps.

sadqa.title: Sadqa / General Donation
sadqa.description: Give any amount for any cause — 100% supports Alkhidmat welfare programs.
sadqa.noDonationsDesc: Once you complete a donation, it will appear here.
sadqa.nothingRecorded: Nothing is recorded until you mark the payment as done.
sadqa.donationRecordedDesc: Thank you. You'll be notified once admin confirms.
sadqa.purposeHint: Optional tag for what this donation supports.

disasterRelief.title: Disaster Relief
disasterRelief.description: Support Alkhidmat's emergency response — rescue ops, tent villages, mobile health units, and food distribution.
disasterRelief.noDonationsDesc: Once you complete one, it will appear here.
disasterRelief.donationRecordedDesc: Thank you. The campaign team will be notified.
disasterRelief.floodsDesc: Rescue boats, tent villages, food, water, and medical aid for monsoon flood-affected families.
disasterRelief.earthquakeDesc: Shelter, food, clean water, and medical assistance for earthquake-affected areas.
disasterRelief.shelterDesc: Temporary housing for displaced families — schooling, playgrounds, mosques, libraries.
disasterRelief.medicalDesc: Ambulances, medical camps, and mobile health units at disaster sites.
disasterRelief.generalDesc: Goes wherever it is needed most — flexible emergency response.

loanApplication.title: Loan Application
loanApplication.description: Apply for an interest-free loan (Qarz-e-Hasna) — pick a purpose, fill in details, and submit.
loanApplication.purposePlaceholder: Describe the purpose for the loan in detail
loanApplication.submittedDesc: Your application will be reviewed within 7–10 business days.
loanApplication.info2: Applications are reviewed within 7–10 business days.
loanApplication.info3: Document verification is required after initial review.
loanApplication.info4: Repayment terms are discussed during approval.

ramadanRation.title: Ramadan Ration Application
ramadanRation.description: Apply for a Ramadan ration package — we review based on family size, income, and need.
ramadanRation.submittedDesc: Your application will be reviewed shortly.
ramadanRation.info1: Applications are reviewed based on need and eligibility.
ramadanRation.info2: Distribution centers are announced before Ramadan.
ramadanRation.info3: You will be notified via phone if approved.
ramadanRation.info4: CNIC verification is mandatory for collection.

orphanReg.title: Orphan Registration
orphanReg.description: Register an orphan child for support and sponsorship. Our team verifies every entry.
orphanReg.submittedDesc: Our team will contact you for verification within 7 days.
orphanReg.info1: Our team verifies every registration within 7–10 days.
orphanReg.info2: A home visit may be required for verification.
orphanReg.info3: Required: Guardian CNIC, birth certificate (if available).
orphanReg.info4: Approved orphans become eligible for sponsorship and support.

volunteer.title: Volunteer Task Registration
volunteer.description: Register as a volunteer for distribution, fundraising, awareness, and field work.
volunteer.submittedDesc: Your volunteer registration will be reviewed shortly.
volunteer.info1: All registrations are reviewed within 2–3 business days.
volunteer.info2: You will be contacted via phone if your registration is approved.
volunteer.info3: Training sessions are provided for specific task categories.

qurbaniModule.title: Qurbani Listings
qurbaniModule.noListings: No active listings at the moment.
qurbaniModule.description: Browse active bull listings and book hissas.
qurbaniModule.noActiveListingsDesc: Please check back closer to Qurbani — admins prepare listings during the season.

hissaBookings.title: My Hissa Bookings
hissaBookings.description: Your hissa bookings and payment status.
hissaBookings.noBookingsDesc: Once you book a hissa it will appear here.

skinPickup.title: Qurbani Skin Pickup
skinPickup.description: Request a free pickup for your Qurbani animal skin — proceeds support Alkhidmat relief work.
skinPickup.housePhotoHint: Helps our pickup team find your address quickly.
skinPickup.tapToTakePhoto: Tap to take or choose a photo
skinPickup.requestSubmittedDesc: Our team will reach out to schedule the pickup.
skinPickup.noPickupsDesc: Once you submit a request, it will appear here.
skinPickup.moduleClosedDesc: Skin collection requests open during Eid-ul-Adha season. Please check back closer to the date.
skinPickup.locationNotSupportedDesc: Your browser does not support geolocation.
skinPickup.locationCapturedDesc: Your coordinates will be sent with the request.
skinPickup.couldNotGetLocationDesc: Please allow location access in your browser, or skip this step.

fitrana.title: Fitrana Calculator
fitrana.description: Calculate and pay Sadaqat al-Fitr per family member.
fitrana.wheatDesc: Hanafi minimum — based on wheat flour
fitrana.noSubmissionsDesc: Once you complete a fitrana payment, it will appear here.
fitrana.moduleClosedDesc: Fitrana submissions open during the Eid season. Please check back closer to Eid.
fitrana.bankNotConfigured: Bank details are not configured yet. Please contact support.
fitrana.notRecorded: Your fitrana is not yet recorded. Click I've Paid only after you have transferred the amount. Cancel or close this window if you change your mind — nothing is saved until you confirm.
fitrana.paymentMarkedDesc: Your fitrana is recorded. You will be notified once admin confirms.
fitrana.nothingRecorded: Nothing is recorded until you mark the payment as done on the next step. You can cancel or close anytime.

zakatPayment.title: Zakat Calculator & Payment
zakatPayment.description: Calculate and pay your zakat — include investments, gold, silver, and cash.
zakatPayment.noPaymentsDesc: Once you complete a zakat payment, it will appear here.
zakatPayment.paymentRecordedDesc: Your zakat payment is logged. You will be notified once admin confirms.

zakatApplication.title: Apply for Zakat
zakatApplication.description: Apply for zakat assistance — we review by income, family size, and circumstance.
zakatApplication.noApplicationsDesc: Once you submit an application, it will appear here.
zakatApplication.submittedDesc: Our team will review your application shortly.

settings.title: Settings
settings.pageDesc: Manage your profile, password, and account.
settings.profileDesc: Your account details. Updates take effect immediately.
settings.securityDesc: Keep your account secure with a strong, unique password.
settings.deleteDesc: Permanently delete your account and all of your data. This action can't be undone.
settings.deleteWarning: Deleting your account also removes every donation, application, booking, and submission tied to it. There is no recovery.
settings.deleteMatchExact: The confirmation text must match exactly.

adminUsers.title: User Management
adminUsers.description: View and manage every account registered on the platform.

createAdmin.title: Create Admin
createAdmin.description: Provision another administrator account. Only existing admins can do this.
createAdmin.createdDesc: The new administrator can sign in immediately.

adminDonations.title: Donations Management
adminDonations.description: Browse and update status across every donor submission.

adminVolunteers.title: Volunteers Management
adminVolunteers.description: Match volunteers to tasks and approve registrations.

adminQurbani.title: Qurbani Listings
adminQurbani.description: Create, edit, and publish bull listings for the Qurbani season.

adminQurbaniBookings.title: Qurbani Bookings
adminQurbaniBookings.description: Approve or reject hissa bookings against listings.

qurbaniSettings.title: Qurbani Module Settings
qurbaniSettings.description: Toggle the seasonal qurbani module and configure bank details.

adminZakat.paymentsDesc: Confirm or reject donor zakat payments.

adminSkinPickups.title: Skin Pickup Requests
adminSkinPickups.description: Schedule and update skin pickup requests.

payment.title: Complete Payment
payment.instructions: Transfer the amount to our bank account and upload a screenshot as proof.
payment.awaitingConfirmation: Awaiting admin confirmation. You will be notified once verified.
payment.bankNotConfigured: Bank details are not configured yet. Please contact support.
payment.notYetRecorded: Your submission is not yet recorded. Click I've Paid only after you have transferred the amount. Cancel or close to discard.

table.adjustFilters: Try adjusting your search or filters.
